---
title: "Default"
description: "The default termcn terminal theme."
---

<TerminalPreview defaultThemeKey="default">
  <ThemeShowcasePreview />
</TerminalPreview>

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-default.json
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { defaultTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/default";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={defaultTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">Default</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
